title: Diesel Particulate Filter Forced Regeneration
description: Initiate stationary or service regeneration of diesel particulate filter when soot load exceeds passive regeneration threshold.
physical_solution: Force a stationary regeneration cycle to burn accumulated soot. Required when passive regen fails due to short trips, city driving, or inhibit conditions.

technical_solution.elm327_feasibility: Partial — reading soot/load PIDs accessible; initiating forced regen typically requires $31 routine + safety interlocks. Standard ELM327 may not handle timing reliably.
preconditions: Vehicle in open ventilated area, exhaust outlet clear
Engine oil and coolant at safe operating range
Parking brake applied, transmission in Park/Neutral
Battery support connected for long regen cycle

procedure_steps.description: Park in open area. Apply parking brake. Connect battery support charger.
Read DPF soot load and EGT values via $22. Verify soot load > threshold requiring forced regen.
Enter extended session $10 03. Security access $27 if required by OEM.
Monitor via $22: EGT sensors, RPM, injection status, soot mass reduction. Cycle typically 20-45 min.
Allow engine idle cool-down after regen complete. Do not shut off immediately.
Recheck soot load. Confirm DPF differential pressure returned to baseline.

oem_notes.Ford: IDS/FDRS service bay regen. Monitor EGT closely. Follow brake/hood/door interlock prompts.
oem_notes.GM: Duramax enforces multiple prerequisites. Inhibit flags must be cleared before command acceptance.
oem_notes.VW/Audi: ODIS-guided regen linked to measured values and adaptation channels. SFD on 2019+ may block.
oem_notes.BMW: ISTA service functions manage DDE regen. Road-based completion may be required if stationary fails.
oem_notes.Toyota: Denso diesel ECUs support utility-driven regen on select markets.
oem_notes.Nissan: Diesel market variant. Regen routine via CONSULT III+.
oem_notes.Stellantis: Pre-2018 accessible via HS-CAN. 2018+ SGW may block routine initiation.
oem_notes.Hyundai/Kia: Export/diesel market. GDS Mobile guided regen. 2019+ gateway may restrict.
